facts.excerpt: Google Axion Processors, our first custom Arm-based CPUs designed for the data center
facts.notes: Axion = Google's first in-house Arm-based data center CPU (Arm Neoverse V2); up to 50% better perf and 60% better energy efficiency vs comparable x86.

verification.verifier_note: STATUS MISMATCH. As of the cited April 10, 2024 page, Axion is NOT operational: 'will be available to Google Cloud customers later this year' and 'available in preview in the coming months.' It was announced/preview at this date, not operational. (Custom silicon = true is correct, but the 'operation

facts.excerpt: energy supply agreement that will add 115 MW of new around-the-clock enhanced geothermal power... developed by Fervo Energy and delivered by NV Energy
facts.notes: Enhanced geothermal via Fervo (Corsac Station), delivered through NV Energy Clean Transition Tariff for Google's Storey County NV data centers + Las Vegas cloud region. Nevada regulators approved May 2025; expected online 2026.

facts.excerpt: this deal will enable up to 500 MW of new 24/7 carbon-free power to U.S. electricity grids
facts.notes: Master Plant Development Agreement with Kairos Power for advanced nuclear SMRs; 'up to 500 MW', first SMR by 2030, remainder through 2035. First corporate PPA for new nuclear SMRs. Value is stated ceiling.

verification.verifier_note: Page states 'this deal will enable up to 500 MW of new 24/7 carbon-free power' via the world's first corporate agreement to purchase nuclear energy from Kairos SMRs. Matches 500 MW contracted.

facts.excerpt: This record investment pushed our carbon-free energy use from 64% to 66% on an hourly basis
facts.notes: Carbon-free energy share across Google data centers+offices on hourly-matching basis (2024 reporting year); 2.5 GW of new clean energy added to serving grids in 2024. Value = 66 (percent).

verification.verifier_note: Page states 'This record investment pushed our carbon-free energy use from 64% to 66% on an hourly basis' — an achieved 2024 figure. Matches 66%, operational/achieved. Note: it is specifically hourly-basis CFE across Google's operations.

facts.excerpt: Ironwood, our seventh generation TPU ... our most powerful and energy-efficient custom silicon to date ... 9,216 chips in a superpod
facts.notes: TPU v7 'Ironwood', in-house custom silicon; scales to 9,216 chips/superpod, 1.77 PB shared HBM; GA 'in coming weeks' after Nov 2025. Co-designed/fabbed with Broadcom + TSMC per press reports.

verification.verifier_note: Page announces Ironwood, Google's seventh-generation custom TPU: 'Ironwood... will be generally available in the coming weeks.' Confirms custom silicon, announced (not yet GA) as of 2025-11-07.

facts.excerpt: Google has signed a 15-year PPA with TotalEnergies for energy from its 49-MW Montpelier solar farm in Ohio.
facts.notes: 15-yr PPA, ~1.5 TWh total, Montpelier solar farm (Williams County OH), PJM grid, serves Google's Ohio data centers. Domain solarpowerworldonline.com (not allowlisted; totalenergies.com press release corroborates).

verification.verifier_note: Page states 'Google has signed a 15-year PPA with TotalEnergies for energy from its 49-MW Montpelier solar farm in Ohio.' Matches 49 MW contracted, Montpelier OH.

facts.excerpt: Google announces new $40 billion investment in Texas ... new data center campuses ... in Armstrong and Haskell counties, through 2027
facts.notes: Largest state investment by Google in the US; funds new data center campuses in Armstrong + Haskell counties through 2027.

facts.value: Armstrong County TX 'Goodnight' data center campus (with Crusoe)
facts.excerpt: three new data center campuses in Armstrong and Haskell counties
facts.notes: Armstrong County campus ('Goodnight,' near Claude TX) developed with Crusoe Energy. Separately, per press reports (oilandgaswatch.org / distilled.earth, non-allowlisted), Crusoe filed a permit for a 933 MW on-site natural-gas plant to power it — that generation is Crusoe's, not Google's own capacity.

verification.verifier_note: Page confirms 'new data center campuses in Armstrong and Haskell Counties' (announced), but the words 'Goodnight' and 'Crusoe' do NOT appear anywhere on this page. The specific claim (Goodnight campus / with Crusoe) is not literally stated in the cited source.

facts.value: Haskell County TX data center campuses (paired with solar + battery)

verification.verifier_note: Page states 'One of our new Haskell County data centers will be built alongside a new solar and battery storage plant.' Confirms Haskell County TX data center paired with solar+battery, announced.
